title: How ancient road clearing ritual unites Delta communities
description: By Ochuko Akuopha For generations, a simple four-kilometre stretch of earth has done more than link two communities in Ndokwa East Local Government Area, Delta State, it has woven them into one cultural fabric. Once a year, the people of Obecha and their neighbours in Okpai Obeze revive a singular tradition where one side takes up [...] The post How ancient road clearing ritual unites Delta communities appeared first on Vanguard News .
